meta.defaultDescription: Tech studio specialized in building modern digital products. JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js expertise.
meta.kylianDescription: Background, projects and skills of Kylian Titren, founder of KYKS studio.

hero.title: We build digital products that perform.
hero.subtitle: KYKS partners with startups and enterprises on the design, development and scaling of their platforms — with an uncompromising focus on quality and performance.

collaborations.title: We've worked with
collaborations.description: Demanding tech teams, on modern stacks and real problems.

projects.title: What we've shipped
projects.description: Products designed, built and maintained — e-commerce, SaaS, marketing sites, mobile apps.

manifesto.title: Tech partner, not a vendor.
manifesto.body: We tackle complex problems fast, with a strong bar on quality, performance and scalability. No jargon, no over-engineering — code that holds up, products that run.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project.
contact.description: Short-term need, product to build, team to support — we reply within 24h.

consent.title: Cookies & analytics
consent.body: This site uses analytics cookies to understand how it is used and improve it. No data is shared for advertising purposes.

intro.title: Kylian Titren
intro.subtitle: Full-stack developer, founder of KYKS. I help startups and enterprises build modern digital products.
